features: 【4 In 1 Hairbrushes Set】: The hair brush set includes four kinds of brushes: round hair brush,vent hair brush,paddle brush and rectangle comb.Four brushes with different functions to meet the different hair care needs of you and your family.

【Keep Your Hair Shiny】: The hair brush set is not only great for styling your hair, but also for keeping it clean and shiny. Use the detangling hairbrush set to eliminate knots and dust without pulling too hard on the follicle so you can enjoy shiny and smooth hair.

【Multifunctional Combs】: Designed for wet or dry hair, works great on wet, dry, long, short, thick, curly, and detangler hair. Stimulates your scalp for a lovely relaxing feeling. The super soft bristles can pass through tangles and knots, minimizing pain, split ends and breakage.

【High Quality Brush】: Soft plastic bristles massage the scalp and promote blood circulation, helping to promote hair growth. Ergonomically designed brush handle fits right into the palm of your hand and makes brushing your hair faster and easier.

【Perfect Gift Box】: The brush is packed in a beautiful gift box.Fit for birthday,valentin's day,Mother's day,father's day,thanksgiving's day,Christmas,anniversary or other special occasion. It is the perfect gift set for yourself or your girlfriend, wife, roommate, mother, sister, etc.
